hypotheses.finding: The active archive reaches capacity in at least 80% of development runs.
hypotheses.candidate_revision: Replace objective-only archive eviction with a quality-diversity-accessibility retention rule, or increase merge adaptivity. Validate only on the development partition.

hypotheses.finding: BasinGraph v2 mean fixed-budget final-value rank is 3.389 on the development partition.
hypotheses.candidate_revision: Inspect function-group and cocopp target-runtime results before final freeze; do not open holdout.

hypotheses.finding: Mean rank improves with dimension across the observed 2D-to-10D development range.
hypotheses.candidate_revision: Preserve the graph/far-basin mechanisms while targeting low-dimensional and smooth-function weaknesses.

hypotheses.finding: Weakest BasinGraph development groups: High conditioning / unimodal (f10-f14) (mean rank 3.778); Low/moderate conditioning (f6-f9) (mean rank 3.444)
hypotheses.candidate_revision: Use only development instances and the existing development-only ablation protocol to test targeted changes.

decision_rule: No algorithm revision may be accepted solely from final-value ranks. A revision requires concordant evidence from development cocopp target-runtime output, function-group diagnostics and development-only ablation.
